# Skills Reporting

**ALWAYS** report which skills from `.agents/skills/` were used and for what purpose in your final response using the format **skill-name**: <what did you apply> on what **element**, and link to `.agents/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`. If you did not use any skills, explicitly state "No skills applied".

**ONLY** report skills located under `.agents/skills/` in this workspace. Do NOT report vendor skills, extension skills, or any skill whose path is outside this workspace (e.g. paths under `AppData`, VS Code install directories, or other extensions). Those are internal tooling and must not appear in the skills report.
